home.heroSubtitle: Explore our curated collection of handpicked items designed to elevate your lifestyle. From cutting-edge electronics to timeless fashion.
home.freeShippingDesc: Free shipping on all orders over $50. Delivered right to your door.
home.securePaymentDesc: Your transactions are protected with bank-level encryption.
home.easyReturnsDesc: Not satisfied? Return within 30 days for a full refund.
home.support247Desc: Our dedicated team is available around the clock to assist you.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Trusted by thousands of happy customers worldwide
home.testimonial1: Absolutely love the quality! Every product I've ordered has exceeded my expectations. The shipping was fast and customer service is top-notch.
home.testimonial2: Best online shopping experience ever. The product range is incredible and the prices are unbeatable. Will definitely be shopping here again!
home.testimonial3: The attention to detail in packaging and product quality is remarkable. This has become my go-to store for gifts and personal shopping.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive deals, new arrivals, and style inspiration delivered to your inbox.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.successMessage: Thank you for your purchase. Your order has been placed successfully and you'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

dashboard.noOrdersMessage: Start shopping to see your orders here.
dashboard.name: Full Name
dashboard.faq1Q: How do I track my order?
dashboard.faq1A: You can track your order from the Orders tab in your dashboard. Click on 'View Details' for any order to see its current status and tracking information.
dashboard.faq2A: We offer a 30-day return policy for all products. Items must be in their original condition and packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.
dashboard.faq3A: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 business days) is available at checkout for an additional fee. Free shipping on orders over $50.
dashboard.faq4Q: Can I change my order after placing it?
dashboard.faq4A: You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it. After that, please contact our support team for assistance.
dashboard.faq5A: Yes! We ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by location.

footer.about: Kole Tex is your premier destination for quality products. We curate the finest selections to bring you the best shopping experience.
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe for the latest updates and offers.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

about.title: About Kole Tex
about.subtitle: Crafting quality since 2020
about.missionText: At Kole Tex, we believe everyone deserves access to premium, thoughtfully crafted products. Our mission is to bridge the gap between quality and affordability, bringing you curated selections from around the world.
about.storyText: Founded in 2020, Kole Tex started with a simple idea: make premium products accessible to everyone. What began as a small online store has grown into a trusted marketplace serving thousands of customers across the globe.
about.teamSubtitle: The passionate people behind Kole Tex
about.value1Desc: We never compromise on quality. Every product is carefully vetted before it reaches our store.
about.value2Desc: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. Your satisfaction is our top priority.
about.value3Desc: We're committed to sustainable practices and eco-friendly products wherever possible.
about.value4Desc: We constantly evolve and innovate to bring you the latest and best products available.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
